name: REVOPS_READER
comment: Read RAW + STAGING + MARTS (technical read-only for developers)

name: REVOPS_DEVELOPER
comment: Read/write RAW + STAGING + MARTS (all envs); SERVICE-ONLY - the role dbt jobs run as incl PROD; never assigned to humans

name: REVOPS_ADMIN
comment: Full domain access; only role that sees unmasked ARR

name: REVOPS_INGESTION_ADLS
comment: Write RAW telemetry (PRODUCT_EVENTS_RAW_ADLS) - Python/ADLS loader; service-only

name: REVOPS_INGESTION_FIVETRAN
comment: All privileges on tables+views in RAW Salesforce (SALESFORCE_RAW_FIVETRAN) - Fivetran connector; service-only
